title: Villager Expensive Trades
description: This plugin allows you to make villager trades 9 times more expensive by replacing emeralds with emerald blocks when buying things. Also removes "Hero of the Village" effect when you trade with villager.
body:
# Villager Expensive Trades

**This plugin allows you to make villager trades 9 times more expensive by replacing emeralds with emerald blocks when buying things. Also removes "Hero of the Village" effect when you trade with villager.**

![Villager Expensive Trades demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4bQLbUNE/images/e7fc74a63244ce2263ea28ca0a15973987d31449.png)
